<div align="center">

## Know About Me

</div>

<img align="right" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="340" alt="mekyrus art"/>

**Hey there! I'm Aryan Sinha**

I'm an AI-augmented developer who weaponizes Python and large language models to build things faster than most people can write a plan. By day, I pretend to understand distributed systems. By night, I'm deploying servers at 2am wondering why the reverse proxy hates me.

When I'm not coding, I'm probably prompting AI into doing my homework, losing ranked games, or reading philosophy and pretending I understand it.

> *Those who see with the mind will always see beyond those who only rely on their eyes.*

> *The real shift happens when you see things as they are, not as you want them to be.*

<br clear="right"/>

---

## ⚡ Top Projects *(built to avoid manual labor)*

[![AI-Automation](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI--Automation-Python+LangChain-0d1117?style=flat-square&logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/mekyrus)
&nbsp;Chains of AI agents doing the thinking, so I don't have to.

[![Server-Infra](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server--Infra-Linux+Nginx-0d1117?style=flat-square&logo=linux&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/mekyrus)
&nbsp;Self-hosted, self-configured, self-destructing on bad days.

[![AI-Scripts](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI--Scripts-OpenAI+Claude-0d1117?style=flat-square&logo=openai&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/mekyrus)
&nbsp;RAG pipelines and prompt engineering. Reading is hard; automation isn't.

<div align="center">

*Code is never finished. It only becomes slightly less terrible over time.*

*Every commit I make is essentially just a small, desperate apology to my future self. Someday I will return to this codebase, look at the spaghetti I've written, and wonder who let me anywhere near a keyboard.*

<br/>
